zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Cruwys於大約1367年出生在英國戴文時，他的父親Alexander Cruwys42歲，母親Juliana Hordelegh28歲。他於大約1385年與Margaret Cornu在英國戴文結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1404年6月8日之前在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Cruwys于大约1367年出生在英国戴文时，他的父亲Alexander Cruwys42岁，母亲Juliana Hordelegh28岁。他于大约1385年与Margaret Cornu在英国戴文结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1404年6月8日之前在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: Cruwys
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Cruse
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name probably from an unidentified place in Normandy named with Old French crues, crus, creus ‘hollow’. Creuse (in Somme, Picardy) and Cruys-Straëte (formerly in Flanders, now in the French département of Nord), which have the same etymology, are alternative possibilities but seem less likely on geographical and tenurial grounds.
English: perhaps a nickname from Middle English crus(e) ‘bold, fierce’, although the regular development would be to Crowse (rhyming with house).

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Cruwys was born about 1367, in Devon, England, his father, Alexander Cruwys, was 42 and his mother, Juliana Hordelegh, was 28. He married Margaret Cornu about 1385, in Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died before 8 June 1404, in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Cruwys est né environ 1367, à Devon, Angleterre, son père, Alexander Cruwys, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Juliana Hordelegh, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Cornu environ 1385, à Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé avant 8 juin 1404, dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Cruwys um 1367 in Devon, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Alexander Cruwys 42 und seine Mutter Juliana Hordelegh 28. Er hat um 1385 in Devon, England Margaret Cornu geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb vor 8. Juni 1404 in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Cruwys è nato il circa 1367 nel Devon, England, il suo padre, Alexander Cruwys, aveva 42 anni e il suo madre, Juliana Hordelegh, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Cornu circa 1385, nel Devon, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì prima del 8 giugno 1404, nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Cruwysが約1367年にイギリスデボンで生まれた時，父Alexander Cruwysは42歳，母Juliana Hordeleghは28歳であった。約1385年にイギリスデボンでMargaret Cornuと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1404年6月8日以前に故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Cruwys(이)가 대략 1367년 영국 데폰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Alexander Cruwys(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Juliana Hordelegh(은)는 28세였다. 그는 대략 1385년 영국 데폰에서 Margaret Cornu(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1404년 6월 8일 이전 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

mn.abt 1367–Bef 8 Jun 1404: ойролцоогоор 1367 он–1404 оны Зургаадугаар сарын 8–наас өмнө

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Cruwys nasceu aproximadamente 1367, em Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Alexander Cruwys, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Juliana Hordelegh, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Cornu aproximadamente 1385, em Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu antes 8 de junho de 1404, em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Cruwys родился около 1367 г. в местности девон, Англия, его отцу по имени Alexander Cruwys было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Juliana Hordelegh, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Cornu около 1385 г. в местности девон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер перед 8 июнь 1404 г. в его родном городе.

sm.abt 1367–Bef 8 Jun 1404: e tusa o le 1367–a'e le'I oo le 8 Iuni 1404

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert Cruwys nació aproximadamente 1367, en Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, Alexander Cruwys, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Juliana Hordelegh, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Margaret Cornu aproximadamente 1385, en Devon, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió antes de 8 de junio de 1404, en su pueblo.
